nasb.text: Jacob set up a pillar over her grave; that is the pillar of Rachel’s grave to this day.

esv.text: and Jacob set up a pillar over her tomb. It is the pillar of Rachel’s tomb, which is there to this day.

cnv.text: 雅各在她的墳墓上立了一根柱子，就是拉結的墓碑，到今天還在。

ccb.text: 雅各在她的坟上立了石碑，至今还在。

csbs.text: 雅各在她的坟墓上立了一根柱子，这就是瑞秋的墓碑，直到今天。
